TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Chunri Nsgan Chunri o gaga Nsgan Pingtung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 155.55 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 67.65 km², dxgal pmblxan o 84.62 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 4,802, sapah o 1,357, seejiq tnpusu 4,590 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 96% (Paywang). Paywang ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Chunri o niqan 6 alang ni maxal 6. 6 o, Lalekeleke , Kasuga , Seveng , Tjuvecekadan , Kuabar , Kinayiman . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: ʦħunɾi nsgan ʦħunɾi o gaga nsgan piŋtuŋ, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o **.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **% (pajwaŋ). pajwaŋ ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan ʦħunɾi o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal *. * o, laləkələkə , kasuga , sə*əŋ , tɟu*əʦəkadan , kuabaɾ , kinajiman . pusupnjaħan patas
S.FORM: Chunri Nsgan Chunri o gaga Nsgan Pingtung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 155.55 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 67.65 km², dxgal pmblxan o 84.62 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 4,802, sapah o 1,357, seejiq tnpusu 4,590 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 96% (Paywang). Paywang ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Chunri o niqan 6 alang ni maxal 6. 6 o, Lalekeleke , Kasuga , Seveng , Tjuvecekadan , Kuabar , Kinayiman . pusupnyahan patas
